description_long: This is a two-story residential house surrounded by a dense arrangement of mature trees, providing a sense of privacy and seclusion. The house features a dark, gable-style roof and a light-colored facade, with multiple windows distributed across both stories. A paved driveway and walkway lead up to the main entrance, which is partially obscured by the trees. The property is bordered by a straight road, and there appears to be a small patio or paved area adjacent to the house. The landscaping is lush, with trees forming a natural barrier around the home, and the overall setting suggests a suburban or upscale neighborhood environment.
description: A two-story house with a dark gable roof, light facade, and multiple windows, surrounded by mature trees and bordered by a road.
description_view_0: Front view showing the house partially hidden by trees, with the road and main entrance visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the driveway, more of the side yard, and a glimpse of a patio or paved area.
description_view_2: Rear view with the house mostly obscured by trees, showing the back facade and some windows.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the road, dense tree coverage, and the side of the house with visible windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a paved walkway, partially obscured by trees, featuring a simple door and minimal decorative elements.
